evidence_snippet: Petyr Baelish gives Sansa Stark the name Alayne, after his mother, when disguising her as his bastard daughter
evidence_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Storm of Swords
rationale: Alayne Baelish is a false identity created by Petyr Baelish for Sansa Stark; Sansa's node has Alayne Stone listed as an alias
Quote section associates Alayne Baelish dialogue with Sansa Stark; confirms identity equivalence
